case_title: MAJOR LEGAL SERVICES VS JACOB ATTORNEY SERVICE

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT JACOB ATTORNEY SERVICE
CONTINUANCE REQUEST FROM DEFT. FORWARD TO DEPT.C.

REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE FROM DEFENDANT DENIED.
